pokemon:skorupi.name: Skorupi
pokemon:skorupi.summary: It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.
As soon as the tail claws close, its needle tips secrete poison. It can survive a year without food.
It lives in arid regions and can go without food for a year while waiting for prey.
It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.
It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.
Its claws are not only razor-sharp but poisonous, making Skorupi a highly dangerous Pokémon. It seems to be weakened by cold temperatures, however.
It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.
It lives in arid lands. It buries itself in sand and lies in wait for unsuspecting prey.
As soon as the tail claws close, its needle tips secrete poison. It can survive a year without food.
It attacks using the claws on its tail. Once locked in its grip, its prey is unable to move as this Pokémon’s poison seeps in.
It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.
After burrowing into the sand, it waits patiently for prey to come near. This Pokémon and Sizzlipede share common descent.
As soon as the tail claws close, its needle tips secrete poison. It can survive a year without food.
It lives in arid regions and can go without food for a year while waiting for prey.
It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.
It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It burrows under the sand to lie in wait for prey. Its tail claws can inject its prey with a savage poison.

pokemon:drapion.name: Drapion
pokemon:drapion.summary: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.
Possessing a sturdy build, it takes pride in its strength, taking down foes without using toxins.
It takes pride in its strength. Even though it can tear foes apart, it finishes them off with powerful poison.
It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.
It attacks people and Pokémon that cross the desert. This has only furthered its bad reputation.
Has a brutish, ferocious temperament. With immense strength and a sturdy shell off which swords will bounce, it rampages about and wreaks havoc.
It takes pride in its strength. Even though it can tear foes apart, it finishes them off with powerful poison.
Its body is encased in a sturdy shell. Its head rotates 180 degrees, eliminating blind spots.
Possessing a sturdy build, it takes pride in its strength, taking down foes without using toxins.
It’s so vicious that it’s called the Sand Demon. Yet when confronted by Hippowdon, Drapion keeps a low profile and will never pick a fight.
It attacks people and Pokémon that cross the desert. This has only furthered its bad reputation.
Its poison is potent, but it rarely sees use. This Pokémon prefers to use physical force instead, going on rampages with its car-crushing strength.
Possessing a sturdy build, it takes pride in its strength, taking down foes without using toxins.
It takes pride in its strength. Even though it can tear foes apart, it finishes them off with powerful poison.
It takes pride in its strength. Even though it can tear foes apart, it finishes them off with powerful poison.
It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.
